title: RAG knowledge-base chunk
description: One line of data/processed/chunks.jsonl. Shape follows the homework spec's own sample chunk: chunk_id and text at the top level, everything else nested under metadata. See 06-chunk-schema.md for the field-by-field generation rules.

text.description: Breadcrumb prefix ('<Doc Title> > <Section>. ') followed by the chunk body. Hard ceiling 1000 chars INCLUDING the prefix; the splitter target is 800 (see 05-chunking-strategy.md).

source_file.description: Repo-relative path of the source document

chunk_index.description: 1-based position within its document; contiguous 1..N per document_id

title.description: The document's H1 (fallback: filename stem, title-cased)

section.description: Nearest H2/H3 heading; 'Introduction' for body before the first H2; never the title. Merged chunks carry the FIRST section's name.

document_type.description: Canonical vocabulary — this enum is the single source of truth (see 04-corpus-plan.md)
